reviews.title: Battery life is incredible
reviews.body: Got 9 hours out of this on a single charge. Build feels solid too.
reviews.author: Alex P.

reviews.title: Charging port broke after 3 weeks
reviews.body: Worked great until the USB-C port got loose. Now it only charges if I hold the cable at an angle.
reviews.author: Sam K.

reviews.title: Stylish, manual is bad
reviews.body: Looks great. The included manual reads like it was Google-translated.
reviews.author: Riley T.
